description: Vendored runtime primitive inventory and migration map for asupersync
key_finding: Vendored crates use exclusively smol (68 refs) with zero tokio. Three crates already have async-asupersync feature gates.

migration_waves.label: Already compatible
migration_waves.action: Validate and lock async-asupersync feature contracts

migration_waves.label: Codec adapter
migration_waves.action: Replace smol I/O traits with asupersync adapter

migration_waves.label: SSH adapter
migration_waves.action: Adapter for smol channels, block_on, and async I/O; migrate 37 test harness calls

migration_waves.label: Config/scripting isolation
migration_waves.action: Feature-gate isolation for Lua-only smol usage; harmonize with ssh/promise

migration_waves.label: Mux transitivity
migration_waves.action: No direct work; migration follows upstream ssh/config/promise

migration_waves.label: Dev-only traits
migration_waves.action: Transparent; futures trait re-exports only in dev-deps

scripting.note: smol only via lua feature → config dep

downstream_beads.ft-e34d9.10.5.3: wezterm-ssh and remote transport migration (depends on this)
